data.body: Investigation: working-as-designed, no code fix possible. Claude Code Agent tool subagent_type only accepts built-in types. CLAUDE.md line 77 explicitly states inline dispatch is the primary path and dso:* values are not valid. The plugin registered agents are read inline as .md prompts, not routed via subagent_type. No code change possible without Claude Code API changes. Leaving open per protocol.
